title: AES Cipher
description: Native Web Crypto AES-GCM / CBC / CTR; 128/192/256-bit keys; PBKDF2 passphrase derivation; random IV; Base64 / Hex I/O
disclaimer: Everything runs locally in your browser — keys and passphrases never leave your machine, and are wiped on refresh. Store keys, IVs, and salts safely yourself.

key.passphraseHint: Key derived from passphrase + salt via PBKDF2-SHA256 (default 200,000 iterations). Decryption needs the same salt and iteration count.

iv.aadPlaceholder: Plain text AAD (not encrypted but authenticated)

errors.keyLenMismatch: Key length {{actual}} bytes does not match the chosen {{expected}} bytes
errors.ivLenMismatch: IV length {{actual}} bytes; must be {{expected}} bytes
errors.decryptFail: Decryption failed: key, IV, salt or ciphertext mismatch (GCM auth failure also lands here)
